displayName: LoongSuite Pilot AI Coding 团队报表
description: 面向二级部门到三级团队的 LoongSuite Pilot / AI Coding 使用、覆盖率、Token、Skill 与 Tool 洞察。

attribute.remark: 按spec重新生成并发布团队报表

chartQueries.query: * | WITH dept_user AS ( SELECT work_no, name, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3 FROM department WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> '' GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name ) SELECT dept_name_2 AS "dept_name_2" FROM dept_user WHERE dept_name_2 <> '' GROUP BY dept_name_2 ORDER BY dept_name_2 LIMIT 1000
chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | WITH dept_user AS ( SELECT work_no, name, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3 FROM department WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> '' GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name ) SELECT dept_name_2 AS "dept_name_2" FROM dept_user WHERE dept_name_2 <> '' GROUP BY dept_name_2 ORDER BY dept_name_2 LIMIT 1000

display.text: 可选择二级部门查看团队明细；不选择时展示全部团队。

chartQueries.query: * | WITH dept_user AS ( SELECT work_no, name, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3 FROM department WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> '' GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name ), active_user AS ( SELECT date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t, "user.id" AS user_id, coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type, coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider, coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model, sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens, sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens, sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens, count(1) AS events FROM log WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> '' GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model ) SELECT approx_distinct(d.work_no) AS "总人数" FROM dept_user d WHERE 1 = 1

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH dept_user AS (
  SELECT
    work_no,
    name,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3
  FROM department
  WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> ''
  GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name
),
hourly_user AS (
  SELECT
    date_format(from_unixtime(__time__), '%H:00') AS h,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY h, user_id
)

SELECT
  a.h AS "小时",
  coalesce(sum(a.total_tokens), 0) AS "总Token"
FROM hourly_user a
JOIN dept_user d ON d.work_no = a.user_id
WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY a.h
ORDER BY a.h

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH dept_user AS (
  SELECT
    work_no,
    name,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3
  FROM department
  WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> ''
  GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name
),
active_user AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
)
SELECT
  coalesce(nullif(d.dept_name_3, ''), '未分组') AS "团队",
  approx_distinct(d.work_no) AS "总人数",
  approx_distinct(a.user_id) AS "使用人数",
  round(approx_distinct(a.user_id) * 100.0 / nullif(approx_distinct(d.work_no), 0), 2) AS "覆盖率(%)",
  coalesce(sum(a.events), 0) AS "事件数",
  coalesce(sum(a.input_tokens), 0) AS "输入Token",
  coalesce(sum(a.output_tokens), 0) AS "输出Token",
  coalesce(sum(a.total_tokens), 0) AS "总Token",
  round(coalesce(sum(a.total_tokens), 0) / nullif(approx_distinct(a.user_id), 0), 2) AS "人均Token"
FROM dept_user d
LEFT JOIN active_user a ON d.work_no = a.user_id
WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY coalesce(nullif(d.dept_name_3, ''), '未分组')
ORDER BY "总Token" DESC
LIMIT 1000

chartQueries.query: * | WITH dept_user AS ( SELECT work_no, name, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2, COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3 FROM department WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> '' GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name ) SELECT skill_name AS "Skill", count(1) AS "调用次数" FROM ( SELECT t."user.id" AS user_id, CASE WHEN regexp_like(regexp_extract(t."gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/[^/]+$', 1), '^v?[0-9]+\.[0-9]+') THEN regexp_extract(t."gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/v?[0-9][^/]*/[^/]+$', 1) WHEN lower(regexp_extract(t."gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/[^/]+$', 1)) IN ('skills', 'skill', '.claude', 'agents', 'resources', '.qoderwork', 'docs') THEN regexp_replace(regexp_extract(t."gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)$', 1), '(?i)(\.skill)?\.md$', '') ELSE regexp_extract(t."gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '/([^/]+)/[^/]+$', 1) END AS skill_name FROM log t JOIN dept_user d ON t."user.id" = d.work_no WHERE regexp_like(t."gen_ai.tool.call.arguments.file_path", '(?i)(/SKILL\.md|/[^/]+\.skill\.md)$') AND 1 = 1 ) WHERE skill_name IS NOT NULL AND skill_name <> '' AND upper(skill_name) <> 'SKILL' GROUP BY skill_name ORDER BY "调用次数" DESC LIMIT 10

chartQueries.query:
* | WITH dept_user AS (
  SELECT
    work_no,
    name,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3
  FROM department
  WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> ''
  GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name
),
active_user AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
),
user_token AS (
  SELECT
    d.work_no,
    coalesce(sum(a.total_tokens), 0) AS total_tokens
  FROM dept_user d
  LEFT JOIN active_user a ON d.work_no = a.user_id
  WHERE 1 = 1
  GROUP BY d.work_no
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    work_no,
    total_tokens,
    row_number() OVER (ORDER BY total_tokens DESC) AS rn,
    count(1) OVER () AS user_count,
    sum(total_tokens) OVER () AS all_tokens
  FROM user_token
)

SELECT
  round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.1) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top10% Token占比"
FROM ranked

    sum(a.total_tokens) AS total_tokens
  FROM active_user a
  JOIN dept_user d ON d.work_no = a.user_id
  WHERE 1 = 1
  GROUP BY a.t, d.work_no
  HAVING total_tokens > 0
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    t,
    work_no,
    total_tokens,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t ORDER BY total_tokens DESC) AS rn,
    count(1) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS user_count,
    sum(total_tokens) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS all_tokens
  FROM daily_user
)

SELECT
  t,
  round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.10) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top10% Token占比",
  round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.20) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top20% Token占比"
FROM ranked
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t
LIMIT 10000

* | WITH dept_user AS (
  SELECT
    work_no,
    name,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 1), '') AS dept_name_1,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 2), '') AS dept_name_2,
    COALESCE(SPLIT_PART(dept_name, '-', 3), '') AS dept_name_3
  FROM department
  WHERE work_no IS NOT NULL AND work_no <> ''
  GROUP BY work_no, name, dept_name
),
active_user AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('day', __time__) AS t,
    "user.id" AS user_id,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.agent.type", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.agent.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS agent_type,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.provider.name", 'null'), 'unknown') AS provider,
    coalesce(nullif("gen_ai.request.model", 'null'), nullif("gen_ai.response.model", 'null'), 'unknown') AS model,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens", 0)) AS input_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens", 0)) AS output_tokens,
    sum(coalesce("gen_ai.usage.total_tokens", 0)) AS total_tokens,
    count(1) AS events
  FROM log
  WHERE "user.id" IS NOT NULL AND "user.id" <> ''
  GROUP BY t, user_id, agent_type, provider, model
),
daily_user AS (
  SELECT
    a.t,
    d.work_no,
    sum(a.total_tokens) AS total_tokens
  FROM active_user a
  JOIN dept_user d ON d.work_no = a.user_id
  WHERE ('${{dept_name_2|}}' = '' OR d.dept_name_2 = '${{dept_name_2|}}')
  GROUP BY a.t, d.work_no
  HAVING total_tokens > 0
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    t,
    work_no,
    total_tokens,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t ORDER BY total_tokens DESC) AS rn,
    count(1) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS user_count,
    sum(total_tokens) OVER (PARTITION BY t) AS all_tokens
  FROM daily_user
)

SELECT
  t,
  round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.10) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top10% Token占比",
  round(sum(CASE WHEN rn <= cast(ceil(user_count * 0.20) AS bigint) THEN total_tokens ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / nullif(max(all_tokens), 0), 2) AS "Top20% Token占比"
FROM ranked
GROUP BY t
ORDER BY t
LIMIT 10000
